_comment: OS-aware sidecar launch mapping for the STTLive desktop app. The desktop launcher (desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs) reads this at startup to decide HOW to start the STT and TTS servers on the current platform. This keeps every platform-specific command in ONE editable place instead of scattered through Rust code. Relative program/args paths are resolved against the repo root. You can change a backend command here WITHOUT recompiling the desktop app. Override this file's location with the STTLIVE_LAUNCH_CONFIG env var. If this file is missing or malformed, the launcher falls back to built-in defaults identical to the values below.
